prompt: A highly polished parody trading card in the style of a classic Pokémon card, featuring Richard Feynman as the subject. Vertical card layout with a thick metallic gold border, rounded corners, glossy collectible finish, and dense printed card UI. At the top left, a silver capsule label reading "BASIC". Across the top, the large bold name "Richard Feynman" in black with white outline, and beneath it a silver banner subtitle reading "Theoretical Physicist". Top right shows "HP 120" next to a purple psychic-eye icon. The main illustration is a dramatic painterly portrait of Richard Feynman from the waist up, wearing a slightly wrinkled white short-sleeve button-up shirt with pens in the chest pocket, curly dark hair, and expressive hand gestures as if explaining physics; his face is obscured by a plain rectangular blur/block. The background is split visually: on the left, a dark chalkboard filled with handwritten physics equations and symbols, including a Lagrangian, psi notation, summation, and small Feynman diagram sketches; also visible is a quote in white chalk text, "The Universe is made of atoms, but atoms are made of stories. – R. Feynman". At the lower left of the art box is a stack of books with an atom emblem and a black-and-gold badge reading "LEGEND". On the right side of the art box, a vibrant cosmic scene with glowing particles, orbital paths, spirals, electric curls, and luminous galaxy-like swirls in blue, violet, gold, and orange. At the lower right of the illustration sits a white mug printed with the text "There's Plenty of Room at the Bottom". Beneath the portrait, a narrow silver stat strip reads "NO. 1918 Theoretical Physicist HT: 5’6” WT: 135 lbs.". The lower half of the card has a holographic purple-blue nebula background with card text panels. First is a red gradient pill-shaped label reading "Ability", followed by the ability name in large purple text: "Path Integral Intuition" with a purple psychic-eye icon to the right. Below it, small black rules text: "Once during your turn, you may look at the top 4 cards of your deck and put them back in any order. Then, you may draw a card. This ability represents Feynman’s mastery of seeing multiple possibilities and choosing elegant paths." Below that are 2 attacks. Attack 1 has 3 cost icons: 2 purple psychic-eye icons and 1 colorless star icon; title "Feynman Diagrams" with damage "60+" on the right; body text: "This attack does 60 more damage for each different type of Pokémon in your opponent’s Active Pokémon’s Retreat Cost." Attack 2 has 3 cost icons: 2 purple psychic-eye icons and 1 colorless star icon; title "There’s Plenty of Room" with damage "100" on the right; body text: "Search your deck for a basic Energy card and attach it to 1 of your Benched Pokémon. Then, shuffle your deck." Near the bottom is an italic flavor quote: "I would rather have questions that can’t be answered than answers that can’t be questioned." – Richard Feynman. The bottom status bar contains exactly 3 labeled sections: weakness with a blue water-drop icon and "×2", resistance with a dark shield icon and "-30", and retreat with 2 colorless star icons. Bottom left has tiny print "Illus. Ben Wootten" and card number text "002/150" with a small star rarity symbol. Bottom right includes a small black silhouette of a standing man gesturing. Overall style: premium fan-made scientist trading card, nostalgic TCG typography, painterly realism for the portrait, holographic galaxy foil textures, crisp printed text, and playful crossover design.
